description_wiki: Vietnam, officially the Socialist Republic of Viet Nam (SRV), is a country at the eastern edge of Mainland Southeast Asia.

description: 1975 capture of Saigon by the People’s Army of Vietnam and the National Liberation Front of South Vietnam
description_wiki: Saigon, the capital of South Vietnam, was captured by North Vietnam on 30 April 1975.
The Communist Party of Vietnam (CPV) is the sole legal party of the Socialist Republic of Vietnam (SRV).

description: Vietnamese communist leader, founder of North Vietnam (1890–1969)
description_wiki: Hồ Chí Minh (born Nguyễn Sinh Cung; 19 May 1890 – 2 September 1969), colloquially known as Uncle Ho (Bác Hồ) among other aliases and sobriquets, was a Vietnamese revolutionary and statesman who founded the Democratic Republic of Vietnam in 1945 (known as North Vietnam after 1954).

description: prison camp operated by the Communist government of Vietnam following the end of the Vietnam War
description_wiki: Re-education camps (Vietnamese: Trại cải tạo) were prison camps operated by the communist Việt Cộng and Socialist Republic of Vietnam following the end of the Vietnam War.

Marxism is a political philosophy and method of socioeconomic analysis that uses a dialectical materialist interpretation of historical development, known as historical materialism, to understand class relations and social conflict.

description: communist ideology and state ideology of socialist states, as developed by Vladimir Lenin
description_wiki: Leninism (Russian: Ленинизм, Leninizm) is a political ideology developed by Russian Marxist revolutionary Vladimir Lenin that proposes the establishment of the dictatorship of the proletariat led by a revolutionary vanguard party as the political prelude to the establishment of communism.

description: country located primarily in North America
description_wiki: The United States of America (USA), also known as the United States (U.S.) or America, is a country primarily located in North America.

surface_forms: American government had a program called "ODP"
description_wiki: The Orderly Departure Program (ODP) was a program to permit immigration of Vietnamese to the United States and to other countries.

description: state of the United States of America
description_wiki: Minnesota is a state in the Upper Midwestern region of the United States.
